question: What is the total ticket expense of the visitors whose membership level is 1?
gold_sql: SELECT sum(t2.Total_spent) FROM visitor AS t1 JOIN visit AS t2 ON t1.id  =  t2.visitor_id WHERE t1.Level_of_membership  =  1
predicted_sql: SELECT SUM(table_3.col_4) FROM table_3 JOIN table_2 ON table_3.col_2 = table_2.col_1 WHERE table_2.col_3 = 1
raw_response: SELECT SUM(table_3.col_4) FROM table_3 JOIN table_2 ON table_3.col_2 = table_2.col_1 WHERE table_2.col_3 = 1
